message:
fix(clippy): add #[must_use] and fix format string warnings

- Add #[must_use] to redact_and_truncate_command, format_pretty_output
  in simulate.rs
- Add #[must_use] to redact_quoted_strings, redact_aggressively in scan.rs
- Add # Errors doc section to format_json_output
- Use inline variable formatting in format! macros
- Allow format_push_string on format_pretty_output to avoid churn

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
